title: Here's Why You Should Retain Republic Services (RSG) Now
text: Operational efficiency and investor-friendly measures boost Republic Services (RSG).

title: New Research Details High Consumer Confusion Around Plastics Recycling
text: Republic Services Addresses Misconceptions in Time for America Recycles Day PHOENIX , Nov. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- According to a new survey from Republic Services (NYSE: RSG), a leader in the environmental services industry, despite high confidence levels in their knowledge, most consumers lack an understanding of proper recycling practices, particularly for plastics. In fact, confusion about which plastics should be recycled is leading some to forgo it altogether – at a time when demand for recycled plastics has never been stronger.

title: 7 Ways to Cash in on the 2022 Midterm Elections
text: The 2022 midterm elections are all over except for the counting. Several key states are still tabulating their votes, but it does seem likely that the Republican Party will win back control of, at least, the House of Representatives.
